title: Executive Order 6033—Authorizing the Appointment of Mrs. Ann F. Kammerer
text:
Mrs. Ann F. Kammerer, who, since April 1, 1931, has been serving in a position in the Post Office Department excepted from civil-service requirements, may be appointed in the classified service without compliance with civil-service rules.
This order is issued upon the recommendation of the Postmaster General.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
February 18, 1933.
